title: Deliver milestone-decomposition verdict
description: Output shape for the Deliver Agent's milestone-decomposition conversation in the full_chain_guided bootstrap (process/delivery-loop.md §4.2.4 — guided pre-states). Decomposes the human-signed milestone brief into an ordered list of sub-sprints the Delivery Loop will execute. This verdict is ONLY parsed in loop_mode: full_chain_guided (after the Gate-1 sign-off); a charter run in delivery_only never touches it. Each sub_sprint declares the modules/layers it will touch; the driver runs a deterministic scope-expansion guard comparing the union of all sub_sprints' modules+layers against the human-signed approved_scope envelope (post-Gate-1 scope-expansion checkpoint).

sub_sprints.description: Ordered sub-sprint plan. The first entry is the one the Delivery Loop enters after decompose; subsequent entries are dispatched by the existing per-sub-sprint mechanism.

id.description: Stable sub-sprint id (e.g. sprint-001). Referenced by dependencies + the charter's subsprint_sequence.

scope_in.description: What is in scope for this sub-sprint (concrete deliverables / behaviours).

scope_out.description: What is explicitly out of scope for this sub-sprint.

modules.description: Modules this sub-sprint will touch. Their union (across all sub_sprints) is checked against approved_scope.modules_in_scope by the scope-expansion guard.

layers.description: Δ-9 fix-layers this sub-sprint will touch. Their union (across all sub_sprints) is checked against approved_scope.layers_allowed by the scope-expansion guard.

exit_criteria.description: Observable exit criteria that close this sub-sprint.

dependencies.description: Optional: ids of sub_sprints this one depends on (must precede it).
